stonetop.summary: A faithful of Aratis who settles disputes, keeps records, and stands guard against chaos.

system.concept: A faithful of @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.l50CyKv5NYVJ6EzY]{Aratis} who settles disputes, keeps records, and stands guard against chaos.
system.description: Some communities are home to a Judge of @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.l50CyKv5NYVJ6EzY]{Aratis}, who settles disputes, keeps records, and stands guard against the agents of chaos. A Judge is bound (at least publicly) by the requirements of a true disciple, and is built to one of three temperaments — you can tell a great deal about a community by the Judge it keeps.
